Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1000 "WESTBANK-07D8-1000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $07d8 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "West Bank.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $07D8 to turn off interrupts from the two CIA chips and ack any pending CIA interrupts to allow the game to start correctly. As the original did not have a loading screen, the one included was converted from the Amstrad CPC version by DATA-LAND of Technische Maschinenfabrik (https://csdb.dk/scener/?id=4845).
